subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.6
question_html:
Which are the most reactive elements of the alkali metals and halogens?

A.  Lithium and fluorine

B.  Lithium and iodine

C.  Caesium and fluorine

D.  Caesium and iodine
examiners_html: 70% of candidates selected the most reactive alkali metal and halogen. The most commonly chosen distractor was lithium and fluorine.
